configurations.name: comments
runtimeArgs: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && exec pnpm --filter comments dev

configurations.name: comments-3002
runtimeArgs: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && exec pnpm --filter comments exec nuxi dev --port 3002

configurations.name: docs
runtimeArgs: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && exec pnpm --filter @maui/docs dev

configurations.name: photos
runtimeArgs: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && exec pnpm --filter photos dev

configurations.name: studio
runtimeArgs: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && exec pnpm --filter studio dev

configurations.name: portfolio
runtimeArgs: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && exec pnpm --filter portfolio dev

configurations.name: comments-auto
runtimeArgs: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && exec pnpm --filter comments exec nuxi dev
